Metadata.title: Kkebi Call Van
Metadata.description: Incheon Airport premium call van booking & management

HomePage.heroSubtitle: From booking to dispatch — travel with Kkebi Call Van.

intro.title: Airport-focused premium van service built on trust
intro.desc: Kkebi Call Van delivers a consistent experience from inquiry to ride, designed for punctual and comfortable airport transfers.

vehicle.title: Comfortable interior with practical luggage capacity
vehicle.desc: Optimized for suitcases, golf bags and family travel items. Gray placeholders are shown until final photos are uploaded.

pricing.title: Transparent pricing by route and schedule

city.label: City/nearby transfers
city.note: Based on stops and travel flow.

booking.title: Fast booking after quick consultation
booking.desc: Send your route, passenger count and luggage details via phone, Kakao or SMS. We confirm quickly and lock your booking.

one.content: Perfect pickup timing for my early morning flight.
one.author: Customer K**

two.content: I had a lot of luggage and still felt supported from start to end.

three.content: Fast response and clear communication. I will book again.
